jobline.Supply: ***PRINT 18000 LABELS PER ROLL*** ***FAN FOLD TO 5 ACROSS AND 12 ALONG = 300 SHEETS = 18000 LABELS PER BUNDLE*** ***FINISHED JOB WILL BE 56 BUNDLES = 1008000 LABELS*** ***SHRINK WRAPPED, 8 BUNDLES PER BOX, 7 BOXES IN TOTAL***
jobline.lineDescription: Size: 20mm x 22mm||Material: Radiant/Fluro Orange||Print Colour: CMYK||Tool: D0467(4,15)(3.4,3)0mm Complex||Finishing: NOT REQUIRED||HAND APPLIED||Supply: ***PRINT 18000 LABELS PER ROLL***||***FAN FOLD TO 5 ACROSS AND 12 ALONG = 300 SHEETS = 18000 LABELS PER BUNDLE***||***FINISHED JOB WILL BE 56 BUNDLES = 1008000 LABELS***||***SHRINK WRAPPED, 8 BUNDLES PER BOX, 7 BOXES IN TOTAL***||||
jobline.deliveryToAddress: WHITWORTHS NAUTICAL WORLD ||15 CLEARVIEW PLACE ||BROOKVALE NSW 2100
